tagline: Your Garage Door Broke. Geneva Knows Who to Call.
hero_subtitle: Professional garage door repair, installation, and maintenance serving Geneva, IL and the surrounding Fox Valley communities. Fast response, fair pricing, and work that lasts.
service_area_description: Serving Geneva, St. Charles, Batavia, South Elgin, West Chicago, and surrounding Kane County communities.
seo_title: Geneva Garage Door & Entry | Garage Door Repair & Installation in Geneva, IL
seo_description: Geneva Garage Door & Entry — professional garage door repair, installation, and maintenance in Geneva, IL. Fast response, fair pricing. Serving the Fox Valley for 15+ years.
services_subtitle: From emergency spring repairs to brand-new installations — dependable garage door service backed by years of local experience.
reviews_subtitle: Our reputation is built on fast response, honest pricing, and garage doors that work flawlessly.
cta_heading: Garage door off track? Spring snapped?
cta_subtitle: Call now for fast, honest service or book a free estimate. We'll get it fixed right.
footer_description: Professional garage door repair, installation, and maintenance serving Geneva and the Fox Valley. Fast response, fair pricing, and work guaranteed to last.

services_featured.name: Garage Door Repair
services_featured.description: Broken springs, snapped cables, off-track doors, and damaged panels. We diagnose fast and repair right — often the same day you call.

services_secondary.name: New Door Installation
services_secondary.description: Upgrade your curb appeal and home security with a new garage door. We carry Clopay, Amarr, CHI, and more — expertly installed.

services_accent.name: Opener Sales & Repair
services_accent.description: LiftMaster, Chamberlain, and Genie openers installed and serviced. Smart-home integrations and battery backup options available.

services_wide.name: Entry Door Services
services_wide.description: Front entry doors, storm doors, and side entry installations. Enhance your home's security, insulation, and curb appeal all at once.

about_features.title: Locally Owned & Operated
about_features.description: We live and work in Geneva. When you call us, you're talking to a neighbor who takes pride in every job.

about_features.title: Upfront, Honest Pricing
about_features.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. We give you a clear estimate before any work begins.

about_features.title: Fast Response Times
about_features.description: We know a stuck garage door can't wait. Our team responds quickly to get you back on track — often the same day.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Called at midnight with a broken garage door and they had someone out within thirty minutes. Truly amazing service. Can't recommend them enough.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Replaced a spring in 20 minutes and the price was the best compared to every other quote I got. Fast, fair, and professional.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Installed a beautiful new garage door that completely transformed our home's curb appeal. The team was punctual, clean, and did excellent work.
